title: geum urbanum intermedium
intro: Geum urbanum intermedium, also known as the yellow avens, is a plant species within the rose family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and feathery foliage. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, sore throats, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Geum urbanum intermedium include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Geum urbanum intermedium can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine as a treatment for various ailments.
